name: ppt-outline-generator
description: Result-first PPT script generator for OpenAI-compatible local models

scripts.check: node --check server.js && find lib js test 真实回归/tools -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -exec node --check {} \; && find scripts -type f -name '*.sh' -exec bash -n {} \;
